tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

Riff

[ch]C7#5[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]

Like no other[/tab]

Before you know it you'll be on your knees[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm9[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]

She's like no other[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C7#5[/ch]      [ch]Fm9[/ch]      [ch]Fmmaj7[/ch]
And I'm just trying to make you see[/tab]

[Verse 1]

[tab]           [ch]Db9[/ch]
She's the kind of girl you dream of[/tab]
Dream of keeping hold of
[tab]                 [ch]C9[/ch]
You'd better forget it[/tab]
You'll never get it
[tab]         [ch]Db9[/ch]
She will play around and leave you[/tab]
Leave you and deceive you
[tab]          [ch]C9[/ch]
Better forget it[/tab]
Oh, you'll regret it

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                            [ch]C7#5[/ch]      [ch]Fm9[/ch]
No, you'll never change her, so leave it, leave it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                 [ch]Gb9[/ch]
Get out quick 'cause seeing is believing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm7[/ch]         [ch]C7#5[/ch]
It's the only way[/tab]
Fm9         Gbmaj7 (2 bars)
You'll ever know
[tab][ch]Dbsus2[/ch]   [ch]Ebadd4[/ch]  [ch]Fm9[/ch]
She's an easy    lover[/tab]

STOP 3 beats
